content: listen to music as a morning fuel
Good to listen to in the morning

embeds.title: Regulus EP - "ReReReRegulus!" | Reverse: 1999
embeds.description:
Alchemist, genius, walrus, call her what you like. She's your captain No.1.
Come together, enjoy the show on her little boat!
Imagine, twist and shout, all you need is peace and love.

[ReReReRegulus!]
Singer: N. Storey
Lyrics: Adam Gubman
Composer: Adam Gubman

#Reverse1999, a 20th Century Time-Tra

content: I went to a nice dessert place today
did u see a camel and milk them?
You had Arisu on a platter?!
oh wow those are camel’s milks?
That ain’t camel milk bro that’s mango and coconut shake
I have a pic of the macarons but half the food got eaten LOL
those and macarons too? damn those abs are gone
Why does bro keep fixating about your abs
Idk bro, I only told bro I go to the gym ***once*** and he asked me if I got abs so I said ye
at least im Joker's issue is fine
Don’t tell bro I go to the gym 4 times a week 🤫
That’s what I’m saying gotta keep healthy
I do body building for hobby yessir
weight lifting cuz my shit is so heavy
I would do some calisthenics if I started skinny or something, I kinda did when I was a kid tho
he cant slurp all those shits from me
It’s just disciplen, everything starts small, then it flourishes, if your body is heavy, the results will be more obvious, your body is a machine, and your weight is what makes it stronger
if Seiazen's body is heavy, he is full of shit

Well what I mean is, calisthenics involves using your body weight for the exercises. When I started weight training, I was trying to lose some weight and calisthenics just wasn’t as efficient for that because I was heavier than my strength
Ah, then ye weightlifting was better for you cuz calisthenics is more of using your weight and more cardio
When I was super skinny to where my rib cage would show as a kid, I did do push ups and sit ups and etc
Ah also <@523084324724146193> if u rlly don’t know what calisthenics is then it’s just training using your own body as weight (pull ups push ups, hands stands, etc.)
Doing calisthenics when you ain’t lean is miserable tho
Rn I’m just doing lifting 4 days a week and then I do 10-15k steps everyday on my cut right now
I don’t even get tired, it’s my damn feet that start hurting
Getting a callus on your feet is horrible
Oh yeah, my calves are huge and I don’t even do much for leg day
EVERY TIME I TRAIN OR SPAR, THEY BOTHER ME AS HELL
Genetics are fire, train them and grow em better
Things that hurt like f ck
That’s why there a pain on the foot
On god, my Asian genetics are pretty good, once I get to 10% BMI, boutta be a snack fr
at least u say on foot
i would think the other way
Oh yea do you train Arisu?
Why do hand calluses fr barely hurt at all for me tho
Cuz when you tired and want to rest, YOU STILL GOTTA WALK
I just ripped a huge chunk of dried skin from the bottom of my foot, been bothering me for a while
Bro why it gotta be so hard to get 200g of protein everyday and keep it low calorie
Na dw, it was a thing w water, I made a lil hole to dry the sweat out a couple weeks ago and left the skin on just so new skin can regenerate underneath
So rn it’s already fully regenerated
Bro said regen instead of just heal, true gamer fr

use my whole body to slam dunk him
